{{Quote|Have you heard the news? The Sith Holocron has been stolen!|Hran Beling to Dooku|<ref name="LOTJ" />}}
The '''Vicon''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that grew to a height of only one [[Meter/Legends|meter]]. They had long [[Nose/Legends|noses]], which twitched. [[Hran Beling]] was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Vicon who was training at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] as a [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]]<ref name="LOTJ" /> in [[89 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' to [[89 BBY]].</ref> the [[Dark Holocron]] was stolen from the Temple, and Beling conveyed this news to one of his contemporaries at the Temple, [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], speculating that there could have been an intruder in the building. Beling later competed with Dooku in a challenge against another team of Jedi trainees to secure a piece of [[Muja fruit/Legends|muja fruit]] from a market, although the Vicon was stunned unconscious by the other team.<ref name="LOTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Vicon first appeared in ''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'', a [[2003]] novel written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="LOTJ" />
